---
title: "Syllabus"
format: html
---

# Course syllabus

Instructor: Daniel Precioso

Modules (tentative):

1. Python fundamentals: syntax, control flow, functions
2. Structures: lists, tuples, dicts, sets, comprehensions
3. NumPy: arrays, vectorized operations, basic numerical workflows
4. IDEs & Tools: Jupyter, VS Code, debugging, packaging

Assessment: weekly exercises, two mini-projects, final project.

Office hours and contact info can be added here.
